fields.title: sandbox: move initial state from system prompt to user part[0]
fields.description: Adjust sandbox prompt strategy: system prompt (first turn) only describes sandbox semantics; current sandbox state must be injected as user message content[0] even on first message (SANDBOX_STATE). Avoid conflicting state between system and user channels.
fields.close_reason: System prompt now describes sandbox semantics only; initial SANDBOX_STATE is injected into user message content[0], with SANDBOX_CHANGE used for mid-session updates
